calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Jul-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Jun-01-2009 Continued To Jul-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for James Harris.

Discussions were held as to whether or not notice to the Attorney General should be given. Mr. Schultz argued that this would not be a matter of intestacy. The Court stated it wished to proceed with caution and requested that Mr. Schultz notice the Attorney General. The matter was continued to July 6, 2009.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Shannon.
